task_completion.description: Verify the 'MaunaKea' ground station is created with the correct coordinates, altitude, and weather station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'New Ground Station' dialog in GPredict showing Name: 'MaunaKea', Latitude: 19.8206, Longitude: -155.4681 (or 155.4681 W), Altitude: 4205, and Weather Station: PHSF.

task_completion.description: Verify 'MaunaKea' is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences -> Ground Stations window where 'MaunaKea' is selected or marked as the default, or the main UI showing 'MaunaKea' as the active ground station.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pass Predictor settings are configured for 20 passes, minimum elevation of 35 degrees, and maximum sun elevation of -12 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Preferences -> Predictor settings window showing 'Number of passes' set to 20, 'Minimum elevation' set to 35, and 'Maximum sun elevation' set to -12.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Astro_Targets' tracking module is created and contains the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window or configuration dialog named 'Astro_Targets' that lists ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), ISS (NAUKA), and SUOMI NPP in its selected satellites list.

task_completion.description: Verify GPredict is configured to display UTC time globally.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Preferences -> General -> Time format settings showing 'UTC' selected, or the main UI clock explicitly displaying 'UTC' instead of 'Local'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings and create modules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict application windows, dialogs, and menus being interacted with, rather than terminal commands editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are actually applied within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values must be visible within GPredict's native UI elements (text boxes, lists, dropdowns), not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the tracking module is a genuine GPredict module window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Astro_Targets' module should appear as a standard GPredict dockable window with the satellite list, radar, or map views.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mauna Kea coordinates: Latitude 19.8206, Longitude -155.4681 (or 155.4681 W), Altitude 4205m. Weather station: PHSF. Required satellite NORAD IDs: ISS (ZARYA) 25544, CSS (TIANHE) 48274, ISS (NAUKA) 49044, SUOMI NPP 37849. Pass Predictor settings: Minimum elevation 35 degrees, Maximum sun elevation -12 degrees, Number of passes 20.
